title: duggena spicata
intro: Duggena spicata, also known as Spilanthes acmella, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly referred to as an "elephant toothache plant" due to its ability to temporarily numb the mouth and teeth. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to alleviate toothaches, sore throats, and other oral health issues. The health benefits of Duggena spicata include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and boost the immune system. Duggena spicata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
